test-text-extraction.text: Sample OCR text content extracted from PDF document.

ocrPostProcessing.processedText: Sample OCR text content extracted from PDF document.

test-full-integration.text: Sample OCR text content extracted from PDF document.

layoutAnalysisSchema.success: boolean - whether layout analysis was successful
layoutAnalysisSchema.totalPages: number - total number of pages analyzed
layoutAnalysisSchema.structureType: one of: structured-document, image-heavy-document, text-dense-document, mixed-document, sparse-text, image-heavy, balanced, fragmented

layoutAnalysisPageSchema.textBlocks: array of text block objects with text, lines, startLine, endLine
layoutAnalysisPageSchema.images: array of image objects with positional data
layoutAnalysisPageSchema.estimatedLayoutType: one of: image-heavy, sparse-text, text-dense, fragmented, balanced

ocrPostProcessingSchema.improvements: array of improvement objects with type, description, impact
ocrPostProcessingSchema.processingSteps: array of strings describing processing steps

tableExtractionSchema.type: string - type of table (markdown, tab-separated, column-aligned, etc.)

imageExtractionSchema.data: string - base64 encoded image data or data URL
imageExtractionSchema.name: string - image identifier
